rules.instruction: Produce a `po_brief` output following the product-owner skill contract. Include testable acceptance criteria and justified scope.
Decompose into tasks and produce an `architecture_plan` with structured modules, contracts, patterns, and test plan. Record ADRs for significant decisions.
Generate designs using Stitch tools. Always use `modelId: GEMINI_3_PRO`. Produce component specs with state coverage (empty, loading, error).

Follow strict TDD (Red-Green-Refactor). Produce a `dev_result` with structured RGR log entries, coverage metrics, and lint status. Run `quality_tests`, `quality_lint`, `quality_coverage` before submitting.
Follow strict TDD. Read Stitch designs with `design_get`. Produce a `dev_result` with structured RGR log entries. Run `quality_tests`, `quality_lint`, `quality_coverage` before submitting.
Execute tests with `quality_tests`. Map each acceptance criterion to structured evidence entries with status and test names. Produce a `qa_report`.

Review code for SOLID/Clean Code compliance. Produce a `review_result` with severity-classified violations (low/medium/high/critical). Use `quality_gate` and `quality_complexity` for automated checks.
Create feature branch with `vcs_branch_create`, commit changes, open PR with `vcs_pr_create`, sync labels with `vcs_label_sync`, monitor CI.
